verses.geez: ወሰምዐ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ከመቦ ፡ እክለ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ዘይሠይጡ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቁ ፡ ለምንት ፡ ትቴክዙ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob having seen that there was a sale of corn in Egypt, said to his sons, Why are ye indolent?
translations.kjv: Now when Jacob saw that there was corn in Egypt, Jacob said unto his sons, Why do ye look one upon another?

verses.geez:
ናሁ ፡ ሰማዕኩ ፡ አነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ እክለ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ እንከ ፡ ወተሣየጡ ፡ ለነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ንሕየው
                  ፡ ወኢንሙት ፡ በረኃብ ።

translations.lxx: Behold, I have heard that there is corn in Egypt; go down thither, and buy for us a little food, that we may live, and not die.
translations.kjv: And he said, Behold, I have heard that there is corn in Egypt: get you down thither, and buy for us from thence; that we may live, and not die.

verses.geez: ወወረዱ ፡ አኀዊሁ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ዐሠርቱ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሣየጡ ፡ እክለ ፡ በብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And the ten brethren of Joseph went down to buy corn out of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And Joseph’s ten brethren went down to buy corn in Egypt.

verses.geez: ወለብንያምሰ ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ኢፈነዎ ፡ ምስለ ፡ አኀዊሁ ፡ እስመ ፡ ይቤ ፡ ኢይድወየኒ ፡ ውእቱሂ ።

translations.lxx: But Jacob sent not Benjamin, the brother of Joseph, with his brethren; for he said, Lest, haply, disease befal him.
translations.kjv: But Benjamin, Joseph’s brother, Jacob sent not with his brethren; for he said, Lest peradventure mischief befall him.

verses.geez: ወመጽኡ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ረኃብ ፡ ኮነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Israel came to buy with those that came, for the famine was in the land of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Israel came to buy corn among those that came: for the famine was in the land of Canaan.

verses.geez:
ወዮሴፍሰ ፡ መልአክ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወውእቱ ፡ ይሠይጥ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ አሕዛበ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወሶበ ፡ መጽኡ ፡
                  አኀዊሁ ፡ ለዮሴፍ ፡ ሰገዱ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ በገጾሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph was ruler of the land; he sold to all the people of the land. And the brethren of Joseph, having come, did reverence to him, bowing with the face to the ground.
translations.kjv: And Joseph was the governor over the land, and he it was that sold to all the people of the land: and Joseph’s brethren came, and bowed down themselves before him with their faces to the earth.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ርእዮሙ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ለአኀዊሁ ፡ አእመሮሙ ፡ ወተናገሮሙ ፡ እኪተ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እምአይቴ ፡ መጻእክሙ ፡ ወይቤልዎ
                  ፡ እምብሔረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ንሣየጥ ፡ እክለ ።

translations.lxx: And when Joseph saw his brethren, he knew them, and estranged himself from them, and spoke hard words to them; and said to them, Whence are ye come? And they said, Out of the land of Chanaan, to buy food.
translations.kjv: And Joseph saw his brethren, and he knew them, but made himself strange unto them, and spake roughly unto them; and he said unto them, Whence come ye? And they said, From the land of Canaan to buy food.

verses.geez: ወዮሴፍሰ ፡ አእመሮሙ ፡ ለአኀዊሁ ፡ ወእሙንቱሰ ፡ ኢያእመርዎ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph knew his brethren, but they knew not him.
translations.kjv: And Joseph knew his brethren, but they knew not him.

verses.geez:
ወተዘከረ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ሕልሞ ፡ ዘሐለመ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ወመጻእክሙ ፡ ትርአዩ ፡ ግዕዘ ፡ ብሔር
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph remembered his dream, which he saw; and he said to them, Ye are spies; to observe the marks of the land are ye come.
translations.kjv: And Joseph remembered the dreams which he dreamed of them, and said unto them, Ye are spies; to see the nakedness of the land ye are come.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ አልቦ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ አግብርቲከሰ ፡ መጽኡ ፡ ይሣየጡ ፡ እክለ ።

translations.lxx: But they said, Nay, Sir, we thy servants are come to buy food;
translations.kjv: And they said unto him, Nay, my lord, but to buy food are thy servants come.

verses.geez: ወኵልነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ወኢኮነ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡ አግብርቲከሰ ።

translations.lxx: we are all sons of one man; we are peaceable, thy servants are not spies.
translations.kjv: We are all one man’s sons; we are true men, thy servants are no spies.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ወመጻእክሙ ፡ ታእምሩ ፡ ግዕዘ ፡ ብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And he said to them, Nay, but ye are come to observe the marks of the land.
translations.kjv: And he said unto them, Nay, but to see the nakedness of the land ye are come.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ዐሠርቱ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ አግብርቲከ ፡ ወአኀው ፡ ንሕነ ፡ በብሔረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ወሀሎ ፡ ፩ኀበ ፡
                  አቡነ ፡ ዘይንእስ ፡ ወካልኡሰ ፡ ሞተ ።

translations.lxx: And they said, We thy servants are twelve brethren, in the land of Chanaan; and, behold, the youngest is with our father to-day, but the other one is not.
translations.kjv: And they said, Thy servants are twelve brethren, the sons of one man in the land of Canaan; and, behold, the youngest is this day with our father, and one is not.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ በእንተዝ ፡ እብለክሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡ አንትሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph said to them, This is it that I spoke to you, saying, ye are spies;
translations.kjv: And Joseph said unto them, That is it that I spake unto you, saying, Ye are spies:

verses.geez:
ወበዝ ፡ ትትዐወቁ ፡ ሕይወተ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትወፅኡ ፡ እምዝየ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢያምጻእክምዎ ፡ ለእኁክሙ ፡ ዘይንእስ
                  ።

translations.lxx: herein shall ye be manifested; by the health of Pharao, ye shall not depart hence, unless your younger brother come hither.
translations.kjv: Hereby ye shall be proved: By the life of Pharaoh ye shall not go forth hence, except your youngest brother come hither.

verses.geez:
[ፈንዉ ፡ ፩እምኔክሙ ፡ ወያምጽኦ ፡ ለእኁክሙ ፡ ወ]አንትሙሰ ፡ ንበሩ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይትዐወቅ ፡ ነገርክሙ ፡ ለእመ ፡ አማን
                  ፡ ትብሉ ፡ ወለእመ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ወእማእኮሰ ፡ ሕይወተ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ከመ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡ አንትሙ ።

translations.lxx: Send one of you, and take your brother; and go ye to prison, till your words be clear, whether ye speak the truth or not; but, if not, by the health of Pharao, verily ye are spies.
translations.kjv: Send one of you, and let him fetch your brother, and ye shall be kept in prison, that your words may be proved, whether there be any truth in you: or else by the life of Pharaoh surely ye are spies.

verses.geez: ወወደዮሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሞቅሕ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሠሉስ ፡ መዋዕል ።

translations.lxx: And he put them in prison three days.
translations.kjv: And he put them all together into ward three days.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ግበሩ ፡ ወተሐይዉ ፡ እስመ ፡ አንሰ ፡ እፈርሆ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And he said to them on the third day, This do, and ye shall live, for I fear God.
translations.kjv: And Joseph said unto them the third day, This do, and live; for I fear God:

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ሥንአ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ንበሩ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሞቅሕ ፡ ወአንትመሰ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ወስዱ ፡ እክለክሙ ፡
                  ዘተሣየጥክሙ ።

translations.lxx: If ye be peaceable, let one of your brethren be detained in prison; but go ye, and carry back the corn ye have purchased.
translations.kjv: If ye be true men, let one of your brethren be bound in the house of your prison: go ye, carry corn for the famine of your houses:

verses.geez: ወአምጽኡ ፡ እኂክሙኒ ፡ ዘይንእስ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ወነአምነክሙ ፡ ቃለክሙ ፡ ወእማእኮሰ ፡ ትመውቱ ፡ ወ[ገብ]ሩ ፡ ከማሁ ።

translations.lxx: And bring your younger brother to me, and your words shall be believed; but, if not, ye shall die. And they did so.
translations.kjv: But bring your youngest brother unto me; so shall your words be verified, and ye shall not die. And they did so.

verses.geez:
ወተባሀሉ ፡ በበ ፡ በይናቲሆሙ ፡ አማን ፡ በኀጢአትነ ፡ ረከበነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ተዐወርነ ፡ ሥቃዮ ፡ ለእኁነ ፡ እንዘ ፡
                  ያስተምሕረነ ፡ ወኢሰማዕናሁ ፡ አሜሁ ፡ ወበእንተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ መጽአ ፡ ላዕሌነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሥቃይ ።

translations.lxx: And each said to his brother, Yes, indeed, for we are in fault concerning our brother, when we disregarded the anguish of his soul, when he besought us, and we hearkened not to him; and therefore has this affliction come upon us.
translations.kjv: And they said one to another, We are verily guilty concerning our brother, in that we saw the anguish of his soul, when he besought us, and we would not hear; therefore is this distress come upon us.

verses.geez:
ወአውሥኦሙ ፡ ፋቤል ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ኢይቤለክሙኑ ፡ ኢተዐምፁ ፡ ሕፃነ ፡ ወኢሰማዕክሙኒ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ዮም ፡ ደሙ ፡
                  ይትኀሠሠክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Ruben answered them, saying, Did I not speak to you, saying, Hurt not the boy, and ye heard me not? and, behold, his blood is required.
translations.kjv: And Reuben answered them, saying, Spake I not unto you, saying, Do not sin against the child; and ye would not hear? therefore, behold, also his blood is required.

verses.geez: ወእሙንቱሰ ፡ ኢያእመሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሰምዖሙ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ እስመ ፡ ትርጕማን ፡ ሀሎ ፡ ማእከሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: But they knew not that Joseph understood them; for there was an interpreter between them.
translations.kjv: And they knew not that Joseph understood them; for he spake unto them by an interpreter.

verses.geez:
ወተግሕሠ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ እምኀቤሆሙ ፡ ወበከየ ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ገብአ ፡ ኀቤሆሙ ፡ ወተናገሮሙ ፡ ወነሥኦ ፡ ለስምዖን ፡ ወአሰሮ
                  ፡ በቅድሜሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph turned away from them, and wept; and again he came to them, and spoke to them; and he took Symeon from them, and bound him before their eyes.
translations.kjv: And he turned himself about from them, and wept; and returned to them again, and communed with them, and took from them Simeon, and bound him before their eyes.

verses.geez:
ወአዘዘ ፡ ዮሴፍ ፡ ያምጽኡ ፡ አኅስሊሆሙ ፡ ወይደዩ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ እክለ ፡ ወወርቆሙኒ ፡ ለለ፩ይደዩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሕስሊሆሙ ፡
                  ወገብሩ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ከማሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Joseph gave orders to fill their vessels with corn, and to return their money to each into his sack, and to give them provision for the way; and it was so done to them.
translations.kjv: Then Joseph commanded to fill their sacks with corn, and to restore every man’s money into his sack, and to give them provision for the way: and thus did he unto them.

verses.geez: ወጸዐኑ ፡ እክሎሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አእዱጊሆሙ ፡ ወኀለፉ ፡ እምህየ ።

translations.lxx: And having put the corn on the asses, they departed thence.
translations.kjv: And they laded their asses with the corn, and departed thence.

verses.geez:
ወፈትሐ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ኀስሎ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ኀደሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያውጽእ ፡ እክለ ፡ ለአእዱጊሆሙ ፡ ወረከበ ፡ ዕቍረ ፡ ወርቁ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ አፈ ፡ ኀስሉ ።

translations.lxx: And one having opened his sack to give his asses fodder, at the place where they rested, saw also his bundle of money, for it was on the mouth of his sack.
translations.kjv: And as one of them opened his sack to give his ass provender in the inn, he espied his money; for, behold, it was in his sack’s mouth.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ገብአኒ ፡ ሊተሰ ፡ ወርቅየ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አፈ ፡ ኀስልየ ፡ ረከብክዎ ፡ ወደንገፆሙ ፡ ልቦሙ ፡
                  ወተሀውኩ ፡ በበ ፡ በይናቲሆሙ ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡ ምንተ ፡ ረሰየነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ምንትኑ ፡ ዝ ፡ ዘከመዝ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to his brethren, My money has been restored to me, and behold this is in my sack. And their heart was wonder-struck, and they were troubled, saying one to another, What is this that God has done to us?
translations.kjv: And he said unto his brethren, My money is restored; and, lo, it is even in my sack: and their heart failed them, and they were afraid, saying one to another, What is this that God hath done unto us?

verses.geez: ወበጽሑ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ አቡሆሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ወነገርዎ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ እንተ ፡ ረከበቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And they came to their father, Jacob, into the land of Chanaan, and reported to him all that had happened to them, saying,
translations.kjv: And they came unto Jacob their father unto the land of Canaan, and told him all that befell unto them; saying,

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ እኪተ ፡ ተናገረነ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ [ባ]ዕለ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ወወደየነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሞቅሕ ፡ ከመዘ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡
                  ንሕነ ፡ ለብሔር ።

translations.lxx: The man, the lord of the land, spoke harsh words to us, and put us in prison as spies of the land.
translations.kjv: The man, who is the lord of the land, spake roughly to us, and took us for spies of the country.

verses.geez: ወንቤሎ ፡ ስንአ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ወኢኮነ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ።

translations.lxx: And we said to him, We are men of peace, we are not spies.
translations.kjv: And we said unto him, We are true men; we are no spies:

verses.geez:
፲ወ፪ንሕነ ፡ አሐው ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ፩ብእሲ ፡ ወ፩እምኔነ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ወዘይንእስ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አቡነ ፡ ሀሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡
                  ከናአን ።

translations.lxx: We are twelve brethren, sons of our father; one is not, and the youngest is with his father to-day in the land of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: We be twelve brethren, sons of our father; one is not, and the youngest is this day with our father in the land of Canaan.

verses.geez:
ወይቤለነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ባዕለ ፡ ብሔር ፡ በዝንቱ ፡ ትትዐወቁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ሥንአ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ወአሐደ ፡ እምአኀዊክሙ
                  ፡ ኅድጉ ፡ ዝየ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ወእክለክሙሰ ፡ ዘተሣየጥክሙ ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ ወሑሩ ።

translations.lxx: And the man, the lord of the land, said to us, Herein shall I know that ye are peaceable; leave one brother here with me, and having taken the corn ye have purchased for your family, depart.
translations.kjv: And the man, the lord of the country, said unto us, Hereby shall I know that ye are true men; leave one of your brethren here with me, and take food for the famine of your households, and be gone:

verses.geez:
ወአምጽእዎ ፡ ለእኁክሙ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ወኣአምር ፡ ከመ ፡ ሥንአ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ወኢኮንክሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ዐይን ፡ ወኣገብኦ ፡
                  እንከ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ለእኁክሙኒ ፡ ወትትጌበሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔርነ ።

translations.lxx: And bring to me your younger brother; then I shall know that ye are not spies, but that ye are men of peace: and I will restore you your brother, and ye shall trade in the land.
translations.kjv: And bring your youngest brother unto me: then shall I know that ye are no spies, but that ye are true men: so will I deliver you your brother, and ye shall traffick in the land.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ሶጡ ፡ አኅስሊሆሙ ፡ ረከቡ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዕቍረ ፡ ወርቆሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አኅስሊሆሙ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ርእዩ ፡
                  ወርቆሙ ፡ ፈርሁ ፡ እሙንቱሂ ፡ ወአቡሆሙኒ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass as they were emptying their sacks, there was each man's bundle of money in his sack; and they and their father saw their bundles of money, and they were afraid.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass as they emptied their sacks, that, behold, every man’s bundle of money was in his sack: and when both they and their father saw the bundles of money, they were afraid.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ዳእሙ ፡ አኅጣእክሙኒ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ ዮሴፍኒ ፡ ኢሀሎ ፡ ወስምዖንሂ ፡ ኢሀሎ ፡ ብንያምሃኒ ፡
                  ትንሥኡኒ ፡ ላዕሌየኑ ፡ ዳእሙ ፡ ኮነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዝንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And their father Jacob said to them, Ye have bereaved me. Joseph is not, Symeon is not, and will ye take Benjamin? all these things have come upon me.
translations.kjv: And Jacob their father said unto them, Me have ye bereaved of my children: Joseph is not, and Simeon is not, and ye will take Benjamin away: all these things are against me.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሩቤል ፡ ለአቡሁ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ ደቂቅየ ፡ ቅትል ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኢያግባእክዎ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ ወአወፍየኒዮ ፡ ሊተ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ እዴየ ፡ ወአነ ፡ ኣገብኦ ፡ ለከ ።

translations.lxx: And Ruben spoke to his father, saying, Slay my two sons, if I bring him not to thee; give him into my hand, and I will bring him back to thee.
translations.kjv: And Reuben spake unto his father, saying, Slay my two sons, if I bring him not to thee: deliver him into my hand, and I will bring him to thee again.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ኢይወርድ ፡ ወልድየ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ እኁሁኒ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ወውእቱኒ ፡ ባሕቲቱ ፡ ተርፈ ፡ ለእመቦ ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ ደወየ ፡ በፍኖት ፡ እንዘ ፡ ተሐውሩ ፡ ወታወርድዎ ፡ ለሢበትየ ፡ በሐዘን ፡ ውስተ ፡ መቃብር ።

translations.lxx: But he said, My son shall not go down with you, because his brother is dead, and he only has been left; and suppose it shall come to pass that he is afflicted by the way by which ye go, then ye shall bring down my old age with sorrow to Hades.
translations.kjv: And he said, My son shall not go down with you; for his brother is dead, and he is left alone: if mischief befall him by the way in the which ye go, then shall ye bring down my gray hairs with sorrow to the grave.
